title: Ubiquiti, UA-G3-SK-Gate, UniFi Gate Access Starter Kit
category: Ubiquiti, UA-G3-SK-Gate, UniFi Gate Access Starter Kit
description: UA-G3-Intercom is a brand new high-end video intercom suitable for both indoor and outdoor use (operating temperature -30 °C to +60 °C), ideal for controlling access to residential and commercial properties The intercom combines robust and durable construction with advanced features to ensure secure and convenient access. This intercom allows access unlocking through various methods - NFC card, UniFi Identity mobile application, PIN code, QR code, or Apple Touch Pass * , providing flexibility in choosing the preferred method * The package includes the use of the Touch Pass feature for 10 devices free of charge for 1 year; further use is subject to a fee Thanks to the built-in directory and doorbell function, visitors can easily communicate with users, who can grant them access. One intercom can also be connected to multiple home video phones, making installation in apartment buildings no obstacle Its easy installation and Power over Ethernet (PoE) via UA-Hub allow implementation in both existing and new systems. UA-G3-Intercom is designed to meet demanding requirements for reliability and performance, providing security and convenience for users You can fully automate the gate opening system using compatible LPR cameras: UVC-AI-Turret, UVC-AI-Dome, UVC-AI-Pro, UVC-G6-Turret, UVC-G6-INS, UVC-G6-PTZ, UVC-AI-LPR, UVC-AI-DSLR, UVC-AI-Theta, UVC-G6-Bullet, UVC-AI-PTZ, UVC-AI-PTZ-Precision Enhance your access control and communication system with UA-G3-Intercom from Ubiquiti - a combination of security, convenience, and modern technology in your building Unlocking via NFC card,…
